sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQABRANGENCIA (IDABRANGENCIA NUMBER(10,0), RNCID NUMBER(10,0), DATAACAO DATE, DATAPRAZO DATE, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), OQUE VARCHAR2(4000), COMO VARCHAR2(4000), ONDE VARCHAR2(4000), PORQUE VARCHAR2(4000), QUEM VARCHAR2(4000), QUANDO DATE, QUANTO FLOAT(126), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQABRANGENCIA PRIMARY KEY (IDABRANGENCIA) )
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQABRANGENCIA (IDABRANGENCIA BIGINT, RNCID BIGINT, DATAACAO DATETIME, DATAPRAZO DATETIME, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), OQUE VARCHAR(4000), COMO VARCHAR(4000), ONDE VARCHAR(4000), PORQUE VARCHAR(4000), QUEM VARCHAR(4000), QUANDO DATETIME, QUANTO FLOAT, NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQABRANGENCIA PRIMARY KEY (IDABRANGENCIA) )

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQACOESCORRETIVAS (IDACOES NUMBER(10,0), RNCID NUMBER(10,0), DATAACAO DATE, DATAPRAZO DATE, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), OQUE VARCHAR2(4000), COMO VARCHAR2(4000), ONDE VARCHAR2(4000), PORQUE VARCHAR2(4000), QUANDO DATE, QUANTO FLOAT(126), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR2(2), DETALHEACAO CLOB, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQACOESCORRETIVAS PRIMARY KEY (IDACOES))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQACOESCORRETIVAS (IDACOES BIGINT, RNCID BIGINT, DATAACAO DATETIME, DATAPRAZO DATETIME, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), OQUE VARCHAR(4000), COMO VARCHAR(4000), ONDE VARCHAR(4000), PORQUE VARCHAR(4000), QUANDO DATETIME, QUANTO FLOAT, NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR(2), DETALHEACAO VARCHAR(max), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQACOESCORRETIVAS PRIMARY KEY (IDACOES))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQACOESIMEDIATAS (RNCID NUMBER(10,0), IDACOES NUMBER(10,0), DATAACAO DATE, DATAPRAZO DATE, ACAODETALHE CLOB, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQACOESIMEDIATAS PRIMARY KEY (IDACOES))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQACOESIMEDIATAS (RNCID BIGINT, IDACOES BIGINT, DATAACAO DATETIME, DATAPRAZO DATETIME, ACAODETALHE VARCHAR(max), CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQACOESIMEDIATAS PRIMARY KEY (IDACOES))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQACOESMUDANCA (IDACOES NUMBER(10,0), IDGESTAO NUMBER(10,0), DATAACAO DATE, DATAPRAZO DATE, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), OQUE VARCHAR2(4000), COMO VARCHAR2(4000), ONDE VARCHAR2(4000), PORQUE VARCHAR2(4000), QUANDO DATE, QUANTO FLOAT(126), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQACOESMUDANCA PRIMARY KEY (IDACOES))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQACOESMUDANCA (IDACOES BIGINT, IDGESTAO BIGINT, DATAACAO DATETIME, DATAPRAZO DATETIME, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), OQUE VARCHAR(4000), COMO VARCHAR(4000), ONDE VARCHAR(4000), PORQUE VARCHAR(4000), QUANDO DATETIME, QUANTO FLOAT, NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQACOESMUDANCA PRIMARY KEY (IDACOES))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQARQDOC (IDARQ NUMBER(10,0), ARQUIVO BLOB, DATACRIACAO DATE, DATAVALIDADE DATE, VERSAO NUMBER(10,0), COMENTARIO CLOB, IDDOCUMENTO NUMBER(10,0), CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQARQDOC PRIMARY KEY (IDARQ))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQARQDOC (IDARQ BIGINT, ARQUIVO VARBINARY(max), DATACRIACAO DATETIME, DATAVALIDADE DATETIME, VERSAO BIGINT, COMENTARIO VARCHAR(max), IDDOCUMENTO BIGINT, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQARQDOC PRIMARY KEY (IDARQ))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQARQEVIDENCIA (IDAQRQ NUMBER(10,0), RNCID NUMBER(10,0), EVIDENCIA VARCHAR2(4000), ARQUIVO BLOB, DATAARQ DATE, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), ORIGEM NUMBER(10,0), IDIMP NUMBER(10,0), IDVEFIC NUMBER(10,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQARQEVIDENCIA PRIMARY KEY (IDAQRQ))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQARQEVIDENCIA (IDAQRQ BIGINT, RNCID BIGINT, EVIDENCIA VARCHAR(4000), ARQUIVO VARBINARY(max), DATAARQ DATETIME, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), ORIGEM BIGINT, IDIMP BIGINT, IDVEFIC BIGINT, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQARQEVIDENCIA PRIMARY KEY (IDAQRQ))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQARQQUESTFORN (IDQUALIF NUMBER(10,0), IDARQFORN NUMBER(10,0), ARQUIVOQUEST BLOB, DATAVALIDADE DATE, DATAINCLUSAO DATE, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQARQQUESTFORN PRIMARY KEY (IDARQFORN))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQARQQUESTFORN (IDQUALIF BIGINT, IDARQFORN BIGINT, ARQUIVOQUEST VARBINARY(max), DATAVALIDADE DATETIME, DATAINCLUSAO DATETIME, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQARQQUESTFORN PRIMARY KEY (IDARQFORN))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQCADASTROS (ID NUMBER(10,0), DESCRICAO VARCHAR2(100), TIPOCADASTRO NUMBER(10,0), PRAZODIAS NUMBER(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCADASTROS PRIMARY KEY (ID))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQCADASTROS (ID BIGINT, DESCRICAO VARCHAR(100), TIPOCADASTRO BIGINT, PRAZODIAS DECIMAL(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCADASTROS PRIMARY KEY (ID))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQCAUSARAIZ (RNCID NUMBER(10,0), IDCAUSARAIZ NUMBER(10,0), MAODEOBRA VARCHAR2(4000), METODO VARCHAR2(4000), MAQUINA VARCHAR2(4000), MEDIDA VARCHAR2(4000), MATERIAL VARCHAR2(4000), MEIOAMBIENTE VARCHAR2(4000), CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), DATAACAO DATE, DATAPRAZO DATE, NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCAUSARAIZ PRIMARY KEY (IDCAUSARAIZ))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQCAUSARAIZ (RNCID BIGINT, IDCAUSARAIZ BIGINT, MAODEOBRA VARCHAR(4000), METODO VARCHAR(4000), MAQUINA VARCHAR(4000), MEDIDA VARCHAR(4000), MATERIAL VARCHAR(4000), MEIOAMBIENTE VARCHAR(4000), CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), DATAACAO DATETIME, DATAPRAZO DATETIME, NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCAUSARAIZ PRIMARY KEY (IDCAUSARAIZ))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQCERTFORN (IDQUALIF NUMBER(10,0), IDCERTFORN NUMBER(10,0), ARQUIVOCERT BLOB, DATAVALIDADE DATE, DESCRCERT VARCHAR2(200), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCERTFORN PRIMARY KEY (IDCERTFORN))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQCERTFORN (IDQUALIF BIGINT, IDCERTFORN BIGINT, ARQUIVOCERT VARBINARY(max), DATAVALIDADE DATETIME, DESCRCERT VARCHAR(200), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCERTFORN PRIMARY KEY (IDCERTFORN))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQCONFIG (IDCONFIG NUMBER(38,0), CONTROLEFORNECEDOR VARCHAR2(1), CONTROLEDOCUMENTOS VARCHAR2(1), CONTROLENAOCONFORMIDADES VARCHAR2(1), QTDDIASDOC NUMBER(10,0), EMAILNOTFY VARCHAR2(80), CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), INDICEPADRAOEMP NUMBER(38,0), NOTIFICFORNEC VARCHAR2(10), CODEMP NUMBER(38,0), EMAILNOTIFYQF VARCHAR2(100), DIASRESPFORNEC NUMBER, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCONFIG PRIMARY KEY (IDCONFIG))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQCONFIG (IDCONFIG DECIMAL(38,0), CONTROLEFORNECEDOR VARCHAR(1), CONTROLEDOCUMENTOS VARCHAR(1), CONTROLENAOCONFORMIDADES VARCHAR(1), QTDDIASDOC BIGINT, EMAILNOTFY VARCHAR(80), CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), INDICEPADRAOEMP DECIMAL(38,0), NOTIFICFORNEC VARCHAR(10), CODEMP DECIMAL(38,0), EMAILNOTIFYQF VARCHAR(100), DIASRESPFORNEC FLOAT, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCONFIG PRIMARY KEY (IDCONFIG))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQCONTDOC (IDDOC NUMBER(10,0), TITULODOC VARCHAR2(150), STATUS VARCHAR2(50), CODDOC VARCHAR2(20), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCONTDOC PRIMARY KEY (IDDOC))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQCONTDOC (IDDOC BIGINT, TITULODOC VARCHAR(150), STATUS VARCHAR(50), CODDOC VARCHAR(20), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCONTDOC PRIMARY KEY (IDDOC))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQCRITERIOQF (ID NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, DESCRICAO VARCHAR2(100), PONTOSMIN NUMBER(10,0), PONTOSMAX NUMBER(10,0), IDCONFIG NUMBER(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCRITERIOQF PRIMARY KEY (ID))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQCRITERIOQF (ID BIGINT NOT NULL, DESCRICAO VARCHAR(100), PONTOSMIN BIGINT, PONTOSMAX BIGINT, IDCONFIG DECIMAL(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQCRITERIOQF PRIMARY KEY (ID))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQHISTSTATUS (IDHIST NUMBER(10,0), IDDOCUMENTO NUMBER(10,0), STATUS VARCHAR2(20), DATASTATUS DATE, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQHISTSTATUS PRIMARY KEY (IDHIST))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQHISTSTATUS (IDHIST BIGINT, IDDOCUMENTO BIGINT, STATUS VARCHAR(20), DATASTATUS DATETIME, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQHISTSTATUS PRIMARY KEY (IDHIST))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQIMPLEMENTACAO (RNCID NUMBER(10,0), IDIMP NUMBER(10,0), CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), DTIMPL DATE, DESCRICAO VARCHAR2(4000), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQIMPLEMENTACAO PRIMARY KEY (IDIMP))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQIQF (IDIQF NUMBER(38,0), IQF VARCHAR2(150), RESULTADO VARCHAR2(80), CLASSIFICACAO VARCHAR2(10), VALIDADE VARCHAR2(50), IDCONFIG NUMBER(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQIQF PRIMARY KEY (IDIQF))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQLIBERPROD (RNCID NUMBER(10,0), IDACOES NUMBER(10,0), DATAACAO DATE, DATAPRAZO DATE, ACAODETALHE CLOB, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQLIBERPROD PRIMARY KEY (IDACOES))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQPERGQUEST (IDPERG NUMBER(10,0), PERGUNTA VARCHAR2(350), TPRESP VARCHAR2(100), DTCRIACAO DATE, DTALTER DATE, IDQUEST NUMBER(10,0), ORDENACAO NUMBER(10,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQPERGQUEST PRIMARY KEY (IDPERG))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQPERGQUESTOPC (IDPERG NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, OPCAO VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, IDOPC NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT TGQPERGQUESTOPC_PK PRIMARY KEY (IDPERG, OPCAO))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQPERMDOC (CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), IDDOC NUMBER(10,0), IDCONFIG NUMBER(38,0), REVISAO VARCHAR2(10), LEITURA VARCHAR2(10), IMPRESSAO VARCHAR2(10), APROVACAO VARCHAR2(10), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQPERMDOC PRIMARY KEY (CODUSU))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQPONTUACAO (IDPONTOS NUMBER(38,0), CRITERIO VARCHAR2(150), PONTOS NUMBER(38,2), IDCONFIG NUMBER(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQPONTUACAO PRIMARY KEY (IDPONTOS))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQPONTUACAO (IDPONTOS DECIMAL(38,0), CRITERIO VARCHAR(150), PONTOS DECIMAL(38,2), IDCONFIG DECIMAL(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQPONTUACAO PRIMARY KEY (IDPONTOS))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQPRIORIDADE (IDPRIORIDADE NUMBER(10,0), DESCRICAO VARCHAR2(100), PRAZO NUMBER(10,0), TIPOPRAZO VARCHAR2(10), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQPRIORIDADE PRIMARY KEY (IDPRIORIDADE))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQPRIORIDADE (IDPRIORIDADE BIGINT, DESCRICAO VARCHAR(100), PRAZO BIGINT, TIPOPRAZO VARCHAR(10), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQPRIORIDADE PRIMARY KEY (IDPRIORIDADE))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQQUALIFFORN (IDQUALIF NUMBER(10,0), DATAQUALI DATE, DATAVALIDADE DATE, QUALIFICACAO VARCHAR2(100), CODPARC NUMBER(10,0), TIPOFORNECIMENTO VARCHAR2(100), FORMAQUALIF VARCHAR2(10), PONTUACAO NUMBER(38,2), IDQUEST NUMBER(10,0), RESULTADOIQF VARCHAR2(25), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQQUALIFFORN PRIMARY KEY (IDQUALIF))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQQUALIFRESP (IDQUALIF NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, IDPERG NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, IDQUEST NUMBER, RESPOSTA VARCHAR2(4000), DTCRIACAO DATE, CONSTRAINT TGQQUALIFRESP_PK PRIMARY KEY (IDQUALIF, IDPERG))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQQUESTQUALIF (IDQUEST NUMBER(10,0), DESCRICAO VARCHAR2(100), DTCRIACAO DATE, DTALTER DATE, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), ORIGEM NUMBER(38,0), INATIVO VARCHAR2(1), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQQUESTFORNEC PRIMARY KEY (IDQUEST))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQQUESTQUALIF (IDQUEST BIGINT, DESCRICAO VARCHAR(100), DTCRIACAO DATETIME, DTALTER DATETIME, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), ORIGEM DECIMAL(38,0), INATIVO VARCHAR(1), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQQUESTFORNEC PRIMARY KEY (IDQUEST))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQREGFASES (RNCID NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, IDREGFASES NUMBER(10,0), FASESNCID NUMBER(10,0), PRAZODIAS NUMBER(10,0), CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), DATAFASE DATE, DATAFINAL DATE, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQREGFASES PRIMARY KEY (IDREGFASES))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQRESPGESTAOMUDANCA (IDGESTAO NUMBER(10,0), CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), APROVADO VARCHAR2(1), ASSINATURA VARCHAR2(50), DATAAPROVACAO DATE, OBSNAOAPROVADO VARCHAR2(4000), REPROVADO VARCHAR2(1), ORIGEM VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRESPGESTAOMUDANCA PRIMARY KEY (IDGESTAO, CODUSU))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQRESPGESTAOMUDANCA (IDGESTAO BIGINT, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), APROVADO VARCHAR(1), ASSINATURA VARCHAR(50), DATAAPROVACAO DATETIME, OBSNAOAPROVADO VARCHAR(4000), REPROVADO VARCHAR(1), ORIGEM VARCHAR(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRESPGESTAOMUDANCA PRIMARY KEY (IDGESTAO, CODUSU))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQRESPRNC (RNCID NUMBER(10,0), CODPARC NUMBER(10,0), ENVIAREMAIL VARCHAR2(1), FASESNCID NUMBER(2,0), IDRESP NUMBER, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRESPRNC PRIMARY KEY (IDRESP, RNCID))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQRESPRNC (RNCID BIGINT, CODPARC BIGINT, ENVIAREMAIL VARCHAR(1), FASESNCID SMALLINT, IDRESP FLOAT, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRESPRNC PRIMARY KEY (IDRESP, RNCID))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQREVISAODOC (RNCID NUMBER(10,0), IDREVISAO NUMBER(10,0), DATAREVISAO DATE, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), VALIDADO VARCHAR2(10), REPROVADO VARCHAR2(10), DESCRICAO VARCHAR2(4000), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQREVISAODOC PRIMARY KEY (IDREVISAO))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQREVISAODOC (RNCID BIGINT, IDREVISAO BIGINT, DATAREVISAO DATETIME, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), VALIDADO VARCHAR(10), REPROVADO VARCHAR(10), DESCRICAO VARCHAR(4000), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQREVISAODOC PRIMARY KEY (IDREVISAO))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQRISCOSOPORT (IDACOES NUMBER(10,0), RNCID NUMBER(10,0), DATAACAO DATE, DATAPRAZO DATE, CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), OQUE VARCHAR2(4000), COMO VARCHAR2(4000), ONDE VARCHAR2(4000), PORQUE VARCHAR2(4000), QUANDO DATE, QUANTO FLOAT(126), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRISCOSOPORT PRIMARY KEY (IDACOES))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQRISCOSOPORT (IDACOES BIGINT, RNCID BIGINT, DATAACAO DATETIME, DATAPRAZO DATETIME, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), OQUE VARCHAR(4000), COMO VARCHAR(4000), ONDE VARCHAR(4000), PORQUE VARCHAR(4000), QUANDO DATETIME, QUANTO FLOAT, NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRISCOSOPORT PRIMARY KEY (IDACOES))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQRNC (RNCID NUMBER(10,0), FASESNCID NUMBER(10,0), CODPARC NUMBER(10,0), DATAREGISTRO DATE, TIPONC NUMBER(10,0), ORIGEM VARCHAR2(10), PRIORIDADE NUMBER(10,0), DATAPREVENCERRAR DATE, NCVINCULADA NUMBER(10,0), NAOPROCEDENTE VARCHAR2(10), PROCESSO NUMBER(10,0), CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), DETALHAMENTO CLOB, REINCIDENTE VARCHAR2(10), PERCENTUALDESVIO NUMBER(38,0), STATUS VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRNC PRIMARY KEY (RNCID))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQRNC (RNCID BIGINT, FASESNCID BIGINT, CODPARC BIGINT, DATAREGISTRO DATETIME, TIPONC BIGINT, ORIGEM VARCHAR(10), PRIORIDADE BIGINT, DATAPREVENCERRAR DATETIME, NCVINCULADA BIGINT, NAOPROCEDENTE VARCHAR(10), PROCESSO BIGINT, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), DETALHAMENTO VARCHAR(max), REINCIDENTE VARCHAR(10), PERCENTUALDESVIO DECIMAL(38,0), STATUS VARCHAR(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRNC PRIMARY KEY (RNCID))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQRNCDET (RNCID NUMBER(10,0), IDRNCDET NUMBER(10,0), QDTDE NUMBER(10,0), QTDENAOCONFORME NUMBER(10,0), CODVOL VARCHAR2(5), DESCNAOCONFORME VARCHAR2(4000), NUMNOTA NUMBER(10,0), NUNOTA NUMBER(10,0), SEQUENCIA NUMBER(10,0), CODPROD NUMBER(10,0), ORDEMPRODUCAO NUMBER(10,0), NULOTE VARCHAR2(60), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRNCDET PRIMARY KEY (IDRNCDET))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQRNCDET (RNCID BIGINT, IDRNCDET BIGINT, QDTDE BIGINT, QTDENAOCONFORME BIGINT, CODVOL VARCHAR(5), DESCNAOCONFORME VARCHAR(4000), NUMNOTA BIGINT, NUNOTA BIGINT, SEQUENCIA BIGINT, CODPROD BIGINT, ORDEMPRODUCAO BIGINT, NULOTE VARCHAR(60), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRNCDET PRIMARY KEY (IDRNCDET))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQUSUIMPRESSOS (IDIMP NUMBER(10,0), CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), CODDEP NUMBER(10,0), COPIAIMPRESSA VARCHAR2(1), COPIAVIRTUAL VARCHAR2(1), IDCONTROLE NUMBER(10,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQUSUIMPRESSOS PRIMARY KEY (IDIMP))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQUSUIMPRESSOS (IDIMP BIGINT, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), CODDEP BIGINT, COPIAIMPRESSA VARCHAR(1), COPIAVIRTUAL VARCHAR(1), IDCONTROLE BIGINT, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQUSUIMPRESSOS PRIMARY KEY (IDIMP))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQVEREFICACIA (RNCID NUMBER(10,0), IDVEFIC NUMBER(10,0), CODUSU NUMBER(38,0), DATAVEREFIC DATE, EFICAZ VARCHAR2(10), INEFICAZ VARCHAR2(10), ENCERRADA VARCHAR2(10), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR2(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQVEREFICACIA PRIMARY KEY (IDVEFIC))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQVEREFICACIA (RNCID BIGINT, IDVEFIC BIGINT, CODUSU DECIMAL(38,0), DATAVEREFIC DATETIME, EFICAZ VARCHAR(10), INEFICAZ VARCHAR(10), ENCERRADA VARCHAR(10), NAOSEAPLICA VARCHAR(2), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQVEREFICACIA PRIMARY KEY (IDVEFIC))

ALTER TABLE TGQRNCDET ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TGFITE_TGQRNCDET FOREIGN KEY (NUNOTA, SEQUENCIA) REFERENCES TGFITE(NUNOTA, SEQUENCIA)

ALTER TABLE TGQREGFASES ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TGQRNC_FASES FOREIGN KEY (RNCID) REFERENCES TGQRNC(RNCID)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQARQQUESTFORN ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TGQQUALIFFORN_ARQQUEST FOREIGN KEY (IDQUALIF) REFERENCES TGQQUALIFFORN(IDQUALIF)

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGQACOESIMEDIATAS ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TGQACOESIMEDIATAS_RNC FOREIGN KEY (RNCID) REFERENCES TGQRNC(RNCID)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQARQEVIDENCIA ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TGQARQEVIDENCIA_IMP FOREIGN KEY (IDIMP) REFERENCES TGQIMPLEMENTACAO(IDIMP)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQUSUIMPRESSOS ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TGQTGQUSUIMPRDEPTO FOREIGN KEY (CODUSU) REFERENCES TSIUSU(CODUSU)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGFPAR ADD EMAILQUESTIONARIO VARCHAR(80)

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGQRNCDET ADD NULOTE NUMBER(10,0)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQRNCDET ADD NULOTE BIGINT

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGQQUALIFFORN ADD STATUSPONTUACAO VARCHAR2(1)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQQUALIFFORN ADD STATUSPONTUACAO VARCHAR(1)

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGQACOESCORRETIVAS ADD DETALHEACAO CLOB
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQACOESCORRETIVAS ADD DETALHEACAO VARCHAR(max)

sql.oracle:
CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE STP_MSGERRO (P_MENSAGEM VARCHAR2, P_MOTIVO VARCHAR2, P_SOLUCAO VARCHAR2) AS P_TEXTO CLOB; BEGIN P_TEXTO := '



' || '




Atenção: ' || P_MENSAGEM || '

' || CASE WHEN P_MOTIVO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE 'Motivo: ' || P_MOTIVO || '.

' END || CASE WHEN P_SOLUCAO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE 'Solução: ' || P_SOLUCAO || '.

' END || '

Informações para o Implantador e/ou equipe Sankhya'; RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(-20101,P_TEXTO); END;
sql.mssql:
CREATE PROCEDURE STP_MSGERRO (@P_MENSAGEM VARCHAR(4000), @P_MOTIVO VARCHAR(4000), @P_SOLUCAO VARCHAR(4000)) AS BEGIN DECLARE @P_TEXTO VARCHAR(max); SET NOCOUNT ON; SET @P_TEXTO = '



' + '




Atenção: ' + ISNULL(@P_MENSAGEM, '') + '

' + ISNULL(CASE WHEN @P_MOTIVO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE 'Motivo: ' + ISNULL(@P_MOTIVO, '') + '.

' END, '') + ISNULL(CASE WHEN @P_SOLUCAO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE 'Solução: ' + ISNULL(@P_SOLUCAO, '') + '.

' END, '') + '

Informações para o Implantador e/ou equipe Sankhya'; RAISERROR(-20101,@P_TEXTO, 16, 1); END;

sql.oracle: CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER TRG_INS_TGQARQDOC BEFORE INSERT ON TGQARQDOC FOR EACH ROW BEGIN SELECT MAX(nvl(:NEW.VERSAO,0)) + 1 , sysdate INTO :NEW.VERSAO, :NEW.DATACRIACAO FROM dual; UPDATE TGQCONTDOC SET STATUS = 'P' WHERE IDDOC = :NEW.IDDOCUMENTO; END;
sql.mssql: CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER TRG_INS_TGQARQDOC ON TGQARQDOC INSTEAD OF INSERT AS BEGIN SELECT MAX(isnull(:NEW.VERSAO,0)) + 1 , getdate() INTO :NEW.VERSAO, :NEW.DATACRIACAO FROM dual; UPDATE TGQCONTDOC SET STATUS = 'P' WHERE IDDOC = :NEW.IDDOCUMENTO; END END;

sql.oracle: CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER TRG_INS_UPD_TGQQUALIFFORN BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON TGQQUALIFFORN FOR EACH ROW BEGIN :NEW.DATAQUALI := SYSDATE END;
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER TRG_INS_UPD_TGQDOCEVI BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON TGQDOCEVI FOR EACH ROW BEGIN :NEW.DTINCLUSAO := SYSDATE END;

CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER TRG_INS_CONFIG BEFORE INSERT ON TGQCONFIG FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO TGQCRITERIOQF (ID, DESCRICAO, IDCONFIG) SELECT ROWNUM, O.OPCAO , :NEW.IDCONFIG FROM TDDCAM C, TDDOPC O WHERE C.NUCAMPO = O.NUCAMPO AND C.NOMETAB = 'TGQQUALIFFORN' AND C.NOMECAMPO = 'QUALIFICACAO'; END
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER TRG_STATUS_DOC_QLD BEFORE INSERT ON TGQCONTDOC FOR EACH ROW BEGIN SELECT 'P' INTO :NEW.STATUS FROM dual; END;

CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER TRG_INS_UPD_DOC_QLD AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON TGQCONTDOC FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO TGQHISTSTATUS (IDHIST, IDDOCUMENTO, STATUS, DATASTATUS, USUARIO) VALUES (SEQ_HISTSTATUS.NEXTVAL, :NEW.IDDOC, :NEW.STATUS, sysdate, STP_GET_CODUSULOGADO); END
ALTER TABLE TGQPERMDOC ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TGQPERMDOC_CFG FOREIGN KEY (IDCONFIG) REFERENCES TGQCONFIG(IDCONFIG)
ALTER TABLE TGQREVISAODOC ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TGQREVISAODOC_RNC FOREIGN KEY (RNCID) REFERENCES TGQRNC(RNCID)
CREATE TABLE TGQFASESORIGEM (FASESNCID NUMBER(38,0), ID NUMBER(38,0), DIAS NUMBER(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQFASESORIGEM PRIMARY KEY (FASESNCID, ID))
ALTER TABLE TGQQUALIFFORN ADD SITUACAO VARCHAR2(2)
ALTER TABLE TGQPERGQUEST ADD ORDENACAO NUMBER(10,0)
ALTER TABLE TGQPERGQUESTOPC ADD IDOPC NUMBER(10,0)
ALTER TABLE TGQRESPRNC ADD CODUSU NUMBER(38,0);
ALTER TABLE TGQLIBERPROD ADD CODPROD NUMBER(38,0)
ALTER TABLE TGQLIBERPROD ADD LOTE VARCHAR2(100)
ALTER TABLE TGQLIBERPROD ADD QTDE NUMBER(38,3)
ALTER TABLE TGQVEREFICACIA ADD OBSERVACAO VARCHAR2(4000)
ALTER TABLE TGQRESPRNC ADD FASESNCID NUMBER(2,0)
ALTER TABLE TGQRESPRNC ADD CONSTRAINT FK_TSIUSURESP FOREIGN KEY (CODUSU) REFERENCES TSIUSU(CODUSU)
ALTER TABLE TGQRESPRNC ADD CONSTRAINT PK_TGQRESPRNC PRIMARY KEY (IDRESP)
ALTER TABLE TGQRESPRNC DROP COLUMN ORIGEM;
ALTER TABLE TGQQUALIFRESP MODIFY IDQUEST NUMBER(10,0)
